CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd
Off Calendar Oct-19-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Randall Manvitz and Mark Scott, Esq. for Plaintiff: The CIT Group/Equipment Financing, Inc., a New York Corp.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Janine Reader in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: California Adventure Tours, Inc., a California Corp. as follows:
Principal $86,086.21
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $353.31 for a total of $89,264.52
Judgment signed in open court.
